instruction: I am planning to start a book club with some friends. Can you write an email invitation for the same? The email must be tailored for a general audience, ensuring it is easy to read and avoids any jargon. It should consist of exactly three paragraphs, with the first paragraph introducing the idea of the book club, the second paragraph outlining its purpose and logistics, and the third paragraph inviting recipients to join. Include a bulleted list in the second paragraph with exactly three points, each containing at least 10 words and starting with the phrase "Key details include." The keyword "book club" must appear at least four times throughout the email, with one instance in the opening sentence and one in the closing sentence. Avoid using bullet points in the email.
response:
Subject: Join Us for an Exciting New Book Club

I am thrilled to invite you to start a new book club with some of my closest friends, a group dedicated to sharing our love for reading and meaningful conversation. This book club is designed to bring us together over shared stories and diverse perspectives, creating a warm space where everyone feels welcome to express their thoughts.

Our book club will meet monthly to discuss a carefully selected book, ensuring that we have plenty of time to explore the themes and characters in depth. Key details include a meeting time set for the first Saturday of every month at 7 PM. Key details include a casual atmosphere where no one feels pressured to know every literary term. Key details include a rotating schedule where each member gets a turn to choose the next book. We aim to keep the discussions lively and inclusive, focusing on how the stories reflect our own lives and experiences.

Please let me know if you would like to join this book club by replying to this email or calling me directly so we can finalize the list of attendees. I am confident that our book club will become a cherished tradition for all of us, filled with laughter, insightful debates, and great company. I look forward to welcoming you to our book club soon!

Conflicts between Format Constraints.new_constraint: Avoid using bullet points in the email.
Conflicts between Format Constraints.org_constraint: The email must include a bulleted list.
